hero.title: Manage Board Meetings with Efficiency and Professionalism
hero.subtitle: All-in-one platform for meetings, voting, decisions, and minutes — in Arabic and English

features.sectionTitle: Everything You Need to Manage Your Meetings
features.f1Desc: Schedule and manage board and committee meetings
features.f2Desc: Instant voting with live results and quorum tracking
features.f4Desc: Auto-generate meeting minutes and export to Word
features.f5Desc: Sign minutes electronically by drawing or typing
features.f6Desc: Full control over each user's permissions
features.f7Desc: Manage board members, roles, and positions
features.f8Desc: Full Arabic and English interface with RTL support

how.step1Desc: Register your organization and add board members
how.step2Desc: Create a meeting with agenda and invitees
how.step3Desc: Vote, decide, and document minutes — all in one place

pricing.sectionSubtitle: All plans include a free 3-day trial

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations and government entities

addons.title: Additional Users
addons.body: Add users to any plan at 34 SAR/user/month (billed annually within the subscription).

pricing.whatBody: CCOS is not just a meeting management system. It is a Governance Operating System designed for organizations that require structured decision-making, clear accountability, and professional execution tracking.

faq.a1: Yes, all plans include a free 3-day trial.
faq.a2: Yes, full Arabic interface with RTL support and future Hijri date support.
faq.a3: Yes, you can export minutes as a Word file with signatures.
faq.q4: Can I add more users than the limit?
faq.a4: Yes, additional users can be added at 34 SAR/user/month.
faq.a5: Yes, we use SSL encryption and isolated databases for each organization.
faq.a6: Yes, you can upgrade anytime from organization settings.
